heading: Purpose
label: 32501 Purpose
text: The purpose of this chapter is to reduce economic loss resulting from damage to passenger motor vehicles involved in motor vehicle accidents by providing for the maintenance and enforcement of bumper standards.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3250115:1911., , .Oct. 20, 1972Pub. L. 92–513, § 10186 Stat. 948The words “The Congress finds that it is necessary” are omitted as surplus. The word “maintenance” is substituted for “promulgation” for clarity.
